_meta.notes: Localized strings live in addressable bundles (StreamingAssets/aa/...) and are not extracted here; only the TitleEntry/DescriptionEntry localization keys are included. Use those keys as the display name fallback. ValueContainer fields (common/rare/epic/legendary) are the per-rarity scaling values for improvements. DynamicStatModifierParameters is a list of floats whose meaning depends on the SpellVariant (e.g. armor amount, size multiplier percentage).
